asset_naming: NEGATIVE: the 4-char level codes are NOT hashed asset names. popcount-4, none in id list, and no level-code+prefix variant hits any id in any namespace. They are internal level identifiers/indices, used as raw strings/indices in code, never calcHash-keyed.

uses.teleporter_decoder: SetupAndStartLevel(index) and teleporter dest +0x19d / entity +0x50 (Session 25) are THIS index. e.g. dest 18=FINN, 25=SEVN(1970s bonus), 20=KLOG. Decodes the branch graph once per-teleporter +0x50 values are extracted from BLB.
uses.debug_menu_decoder: ProcessDebugMenuInput level-select (Session 27) indexes this table -> g_LevelNameTable display strings.
uses.validation: exact 1:1 match with the 26 levels in ids.csv (no discrepancy).

structural_insight: Lowest asset counts = special stages: MENU(56,UI-only), FINN(62)/RUNN(68) = special-id-99 3D vehicle rail stages, KLOG(65)/GLEN(68) = small/boss levels. Normal platformer levels 140-208. Confirms special-stage model.
